columns.extraction_plan: Extract the values from 'TABLE 1. Baseline Characteristics of Patients Included in the Primary Intention-To-Treat Analysis (N = 1,279)' on page 5. Sum the 'No. (%)' for '<7' and '7' under the 'Orteronel (n = 638)' column. For '<7', it is 46 (7%). For '7', it is 165 (26%). The sum is 211 (33%).
